zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Jernegan於大約1430年出生在英國素福爾可索莫利頓時，他的父親John Jernegan21歲，母親Lady Agnes Jane Darrell16歲。他於大約1455年與Lady Isabel Clifton在英國素福爾可索莫利頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年10月26日在英國享年74歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可索莫利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Jernegan于大约1430年出生在英国素福爾可索莫利頓时，他的父亲John Jernegan21岁，母亲Lady Agnes Jane Darrell16岁。他于大约1455年与Lady Isabel Clifton在英国素福爾可索莫利頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年10月26日在英国享年74岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可索莫利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Jernegan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): of uncertain origin. Reaney believes it to be of Breton origin, probably identical with the Old Breton personal name Iarnuuocon ‘iron famous’, taken to East Anglia by Bretons at the time of the Norman Conquest. Compare Journigan .
History: Thomas Jernigan was granted land at Somerton, VA, in 1668. Many of his descendants were sea captains. His son, also called Thomas, settled on Martha's Vineyard, MA, in 1712.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Jernegan was born about 1430, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, his father, John Jernegan, was 21 and his mother, Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, was 16. He married Lady Isabel Clifton about 1455, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 October 1503, in England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Jernegan est né environ 1430, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Jernegan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Clifton environ 1455, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1503, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Jernegan um 1430 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Jernegan 21 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Jane Darrell 16. Er hat um 1455 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England Lady Isabel Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1503 im Alter von 74 Jahren in England und wurde in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Jernegan è nato il circa 1430 nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Jernegan, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Clifton circa 1455, nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1503, nel England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Jerneganが約1430年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンで生まれた時，父John Jerneganは21歳，母Lady Agnes Jane Darrellは16歳であった。約1455年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンでLady Isabel Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年10月26日にイギリスで74歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクソメルリートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Jernegan(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Jernegan(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Jane Darrell(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 Lady Isabel Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 10월 26일 영국에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Jernegan nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Jernegan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Clifton aproximadamente 1455, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1503, em Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Jernegan родился около 1430 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Jernegan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Clifton около 1455 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 октября 1503 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Jernegan nació aproximadamente 1430, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Jernegan, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Jane Darrell, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Clifton aproximadamente 1455, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1503, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
